name: Property Marketing
description: Leasing prepares rent analysis, listing readiness, marketing assets, and syndication packets for vacant or upcoming units, with human approval before any public posting or owner/applicant-facing send.

stages.name: Confirm Listing Readiness
stages.description: Normalize property, unit, pricing, make-ready, and compliance facts before marketing work begins.

steps.title: Normalize listing trigger
steps.instructions: Normalize property, unit, owner, target availability, make-ready status, rent target, deposits, utilities, pet policy, photos, compliance blockers, listing source, and data confidence. Any unavailable AppFolio, make-ready, or owner data must be null with needs_verification.
steps.dispatch_body: Normalize listing readiness facts and missing-data flags. No public listing, owner send, applicant send, or AppFolio write.

steps.title: Review listing readiness
steps.instructions: Review make-ready, compliance, photo, pricing, and owner constraints before rent analysis or listing copy proceeds.
steps.human_prompt: Review listing readiness before marketing package preparation.

stages.name: Prepare Pricing And Assets
stages.description: Stage rent recommendation, asset gaps, and listing copy drafts.

steps.title: Draft rent analysis
steps.instructions: Draft rent analysis using available comparable, current rent, target rent, property condition, vacancy timing, and owner constraints. If comps or market feeds are unavailable, record null with needs_verification instead of fake values.
steps.dispatch_body: Draft internal rent analysis with honest missing-data flags. No owner sends and no public posting.

steps.title: Prepare listing copy and assets
steps.instructions: Prepare draft listing headline, description, amenity list, fee/deposit notes, pet policy, showing instructions, photo gap list, and compliance caveats. Draft-only; do not publish or syndicate.
steps.dispatch_body: Prepare internal listing copy and asset gap list. No public posting, syndication, or applicant sends.

steps.title: Cross-check unit readiness
steps.instructions: Cross-check make-ready evidence, open work orders, safety blockers, photos, lockbox/access readiness, and any owner-approved caveats before listing approval. Do not mark ready in AppFolio or PropertyMeld.
steps.dispatch_body: Cross-check unit readiness and blockers for listing approval. No system writes.

stages.name: Approve Marketing Package
stages.description: Human approval gates for pricing, owner-visible messaging, and public listing release.

steps.title: Approve owner pricing packet
steps.instructions: Approve rent target, owner caveats, concessions, and listing timing before owner-facing or public listing action proceeds.
steps.human_prompt: Owner/pricing approval required before listing release.

steps.title: Approve listing release
steps.instructions: Approve listing copy, photos, fees, compliance caveats, showing instructions, and syndication plan before any public posting, syndication, or applicant-facing message.
steps.human_prompt: Human approval required before public listing, syndication, or applicant-facing marketing send.

stages.name: Stage Marketing Release
stages.description: Stage approved listing metadata and showing handoff without publishing.

steps.title: Stage approved listing release
steps.instructions: Stage approved listing metadata, copy, photos checklist, syndication channels, showing instructions, and caveats for a human/operator release path. Do not publish, syndicate, email, text, or write to AppFolio.
steps.dispatch_body: Stage approved listing release metadata only. No public posting, syndication, external sends, or AppFolio writes.

steps.title: Handoff showing coordination
steps.instructions: Stage internal handoff facts for showing-coordination: listing ref, property, unit, approved showing windows, access caveats, application link status, and needs_verification flags. Do not create live appointments or send applicant messages.
steps.dispatch_body: Stage internal handoff to showing-coordination. No appointments and no external sends.
